languages.text: "Яд вас не убьет, только немного ослабит. Добью я вас сам".
"This poison isn't meant to kill you, only weaken you slightly. I'll finish you myself."
languages.original_text: "Яд вас не убьет, только немного ослабит. Добью я вас сам".

traits.locale_text: "The poison isn't meant to kill you but to weaken slightly. I'll finish you myself."
"This poison isn't meant to kill you, only weaken you slightly. I'll finish you myself."

"Well, Seberian's flagship left, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! And the retinue that boarded it promised that they would return to us later. And did they? Centuries have passed — isn't it a little late now?"
"The poison isn't meant to kill you but to weaken slightly. I'll finish you myself."
"This poison isn't meant to kill you, only weaken you slightly. I'll finish you myself."
"This poison isn't meant to kill you, only weaken you slightly. I'll finish you myself."

languages.text: 「まあ、シベリアンの旗艦は去りました、御{mf|殿|殿}様！そして旗艦に乗り込んだ軍隊は、後に我々に戻ると約束しました。そして、彼らは戻ってきたのでしょうか？何世紀も経ちましたね。今頃になって、少し遅くありませんか？」
languages.original_text: "Well, Seberian's flagship left, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! And the retinue that boarded it promised that they would return to us later. And did they? Centuries have passed — isn't it a little late now?"

traits.locale_text: 「まあ、シベリアンの旗艦は去りました、御{mf|殿|殿}様！そして旗艦に乗り込んだ retinue は、後に我々に戻ると約束しました。そして、彼らは戻ってきたのでしょうか？何世紀も経ちましたね。今頃になって、少し遅くありませんか？」

languages.text: « Ce poison n'a pas vocation à vous tuer, mais à vous affaiblir. Je me chargerai de la mise à mort moi-même. »
languages.original_text: "This poison isn't meant to kill you, only weaken you slightly. I'll finish you myself."

traits.locale_text: « Ce poison n'a pas vocation à vous tuer, mais à vous affaiblir. Je me chargerai de la mise à mort moi-même. »

languages.text: "Bu zehrin amacı öldürmek değil, birazcık zayıflatmak. İşinizi bizzat ben bitireceğim."
languages.original_text: "This poison isn't meant to kill you, only weaken you slightly. I'll finish you myself."

traits.locale_text: "Bu zehrin amacı öldürmek değil, birazcık zayıflatmak. İşinizi bizzat ben bitireceğim."

languages.text: "Dieses Gift soll Euch nicht töten. Es schwächt Euch nur ein wenig. Den Rest gebe ich Euch dann selbst."
languages.original_text: "This poison isn't meant to kill you, only weaken you slightly. I'll finish you myself."

traits.locale_text: "Dieses Gift soll Euch nicht töten. Es schwächt Euch nur ein wenig. Den Rest gebe ich Euch dann selbst."

languages.text: «Este veneno no es letal; solo l{mf|e|a} debilitará un poco. Remataré la faena yo mismo».
languages.original_text: "This poison isn't meant to kill you, only weaken you slightly. I'll finish you myself."

traits.locale_text: «Este veneno no es letal; solo l{mf|e|a} debilitará un poco. Remataré la faena yo mismo».

languages.text: “这毒不会要您的命，只会让您略微虚弱一些。我会亲手了结您。”
languages.original_text: "This poison isn't meant to kill you, only weaken you slightly. I'll finish you myself."

traits.locale_text: “这毒不会要您的命，只会让您略微虚弱一些。我会亲手了结您。”
